description: Create a new document in the open ReqView project named 'Glossary' with the ID 'GLOSS'. Populate the document with the five terms and definitions from /home/ga/Documents/glossary_terms.txt, using each term as the 'Heading' and its definition as the 'Description'.

expected_content.definition: Message Queuing Telemetry Transport, a lightweight messaging protocol.
A server that receives all messages from clients and then routes the messages to the appropriate destination clients.
A string used by the broker to filter messages for each connected client.
The action of sending a message to a topic.
The action of requesting messages from a topic.
